null_recomputation_policy: Preserve timestamps, contracts, trade_count, total_volume, and aggressor-flow fields. Recompute price-derived fields and the complete frozen grammar in every null world before identical account episodes.
promotion_policy: ARTEFACT_GEOMETRY_ONLY tombstones the entire exact mechanism class before candidate power, null, DSR/BH, Combine, or shadow work. GREEN_NULL_ADJUSTED_BASELINE permits power audit only for frozen walk-forward-positive candidates.
CONTRE: The counterfactuals preserve trade composition while changing price paths, so they test whether account passage exceeds geometry; with only two calendar blocks, even a green result remains development evidence rather than proof.
